gpu.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 Laptop GPU
gpu.note: Llama-3.2-3B-Q4_K_M (1.87 GiB on disk) FULLY VRAM-resident: all 28 layers in VRAM, ~4.51 GB peak.

source_runtime_head: bb3c3528 (binary built at 0dccbf74; Phase 0/1 doc commits only — no engine change)
build_profile: release, lto=fat, codegen-units=1, target-cpu=x86-64-v3, cuda default-on (Windows)

model.quant_mix: 168 Q4_K (1.362 GB) + 29 Q6_K (0.648 GB) + 58 F32 norms. attn_v / ffn_down / tied token_embd(lm_head) are Q6_K; q/k/o/gate/up are Q4_K. TIED embeddings (no separate output.weight). Exercises BOTH q4k_gemv and q6k_gemv.

comparator.source_pin_confirmed: local llama.cpp HEAD == acd79d6; llama-bench build acd79d603 (9632)
comparator.flags: /completion: temperature 0, top_k 1, seed 0, cache_prompt false, samplers=[top_k], return_tokens true; server -ngl 0 -ctk f32 -ctv f32 -fa off --no-repack -c 4096
comparator.note: CPU-only llama.cpp on this box (no ggml-cuda.dll). camelid GPU-resident CUDA decode compared DIRECTLY to llama.cpp; the GPU==cpu_reference middle leg is N/A (no camelid CPU K-quant path — Phase 2).

camelid.backend_observed_runtime: cuda_resident kquant engine (q4k_gemv + q6k_gemv), all 28 layers VRAM-resident
camelid.disclosure_gap: Same as the Qwen3-4B-Q4_K_M bundle: /api/capabilities mislabels the lane selected_backend=cpu_reference / decode_path=safe_cpu_decode / quant_type=dense_or_other while cuda_resident_active=true and it ran GPU-resident. Labeling follow-up; output is parity-correct.

result.methodology: raw-prompt token+text decode parity (no chat template, no f32 diagnostics) over 8 prompts at 1/5/50 tokens
result.confident_probes_token_identical_count: 5 / 8 (incl. long-context lighthouse logbook ~3.5k-token prompt and code completion, all at depth 50)
result.near_tie_probes_count: 3 / 8 (JSON token-0 fence-vs-brace 0.18-logprob near-tie; process/thread @26; thunderstorm @38) — all coherent camelid output, the documented f32 reduction-order frontier
result.claim: GPU-resident CUDA decode of Llama-3.2-3B-Q4_K_M is token-AND-text-identical to llama.cpp acd79d6 on all confident/structured probes (1/5/50 tokens); 3 open-ended probes diverge at a benign greedy near-tie (measured, coherent), matching the Q8_0 exact-row bar.

claim_boundary: Exact-row smoke for THIS Llama-3.2-3B-Q4_K_M GGUF (sha 6c1a2b41...) on Windows x86_64 (MSVC), GPU CUDA decode on RTX 3060 Laptop (6 GB) / driver 576.83, fully VRAM-resident, raw greedy completion. Token-identical on confident probes; near-ties documented. NOT claimed: bit-exact parity on open-ended generation, other Llama sizes/quants, other K-quant files, CPU K-quant decode (does not exist yet), other GPUs/drivers, or production throughput.
